top_signals.title: Federal Reserve issues FOMC statement
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board and Federal Open Market Committee release economic projections from the June 16-17 FOMC meeting
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board and Federal Open Market Committee release economic projections from the June 16-17 FOMC meeting
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Here we go again? Assessing the inflation risks of the recent energy shock − speech by Megan Greene
top_signals.summary: Given at University of Derby Business School
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Money Roundtable: Hidden Inflation, Social Security
top_signals.summary:
Bloomberg's David Gura and Romaine Bostick join Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." They discuss this week's US inflation report, Apple's price hike, and the future of social security.
 (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Russia used social engineering to breach prominent messaging accounts, Ukraine says
top_signals.summary: Ukraine's SBU described a long-running Russian operation that used fake tech-support workers to persuade people to hand over credentials to their messaging apps.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve notes with deep sadness the passing of Alan Greenspan
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve notes with deep sadness the passing of Alan Greenspan
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Cook, The Opportunities and Risks AI Presents for the Economy and Financial System
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research, Stanford University, Stanford, California
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: PRA sets out adjustments to its market risk internal model approach under Basel 3.1
top_signals.summary: The Prudential Regulation Authority (PRA) has today published a consultation on the internal model approach to market risk (IMA), which represents the final piece of Basel 3.1’s implementation in the UK.

top_signals.title: Spain regulator rules out extension for non-MiCA compliant crypto companies
top_signals.summary: Carlos San Basilio said that “there will be no exceptions ​or extensions” to the MiCA deadline requiring crypto exchanges offering services to EU-based users to be licensed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Walmart heir Lukas Walton buys minority stake in the Chicago Bulls and United Center
top_signals.summary: Lukas Walton is the 39-year-old grandson of Walmart founder Sam Walton. He and Samantha Walton are residents of Chicago.
